calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Christine Robison, Esq. for Petitioner: William Lambson, present as Guardian ad litem for: Claire Lambson, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,096.00
Medical Expenses $4,904.00
A net balance of $2,500.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 121 Park Center Plaza, San Jose, CA. 95113, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
